headline: DOJ DROPS Powell Probe 💥🔍 – Trump Feud FIZZLES 😤🍊
text:
US DOJ 🕵️‍♂️⚖️ just YEETED 🚀 the probe into Fed Daddy Jerome Powell 💼🤑 over THICC $3.1BN 🤑🏗️ building reno OVERRUNS 💸😩 – Trump 🍊👑 been SIMPING HARD 🤡 for answers on that Eccles & Constitution Ave GLOW-UP 🏢✨ since 1930s asbestos LEAD bombs 💣☢️! Jeanine Pirro 🐺📱 spilling tea ☕: 'INTERNAL IG SNITCH SESH 🕵️‍♀️🔍 instead, but I'll REVIVE criminal THROAT-GRAB 😈 if facts SLAP 👋!' White House simp Kush Desai 💅 tweetin' 'Taxpayers DESERVE deets on Fed's fiscal FUMBLE 🤦‍♂️💰 – IG got that SUPERPOWER 🦸‍♂️ to DIG DEEP 🕳️!' 

Trump MAGA-mode ACTIVATED 🔥: Called Powell 'KNuckleHEAD' 🤪🦴 and 'LOUSY JOBBER' 😤 after Fed IGNORED his RATE-CUT BEGGING 🙏📉 – 'LOWER 'EM NOW or GTFO 🔥🍆!' Powell clapped back in VIDEO BOMB 💣📹: 'This UNPRECEDENTED BULLY 🐂 move threatens Fed INDEPENDENCE 🆓⚖️ – we set rates on ECON FACTS 📊 not Trump TANTRUMS 😡!' First time JPow PUSHED BACK HARD 💪😤 against Big Orange, warnin' political PUPPETRY 🎪 could RUIN monetary MAGIC 🪄💸! Low rates = CHEAP LOANS 🤑🏦 for Trump-style property HUSTLE 🏗️💰, high rates = PRICE STABILIZER 🚫📈 but Trump HATES 'EM like Epstein files 🚫📜!

Powell's TERM DYING 😵 5/15 but he's SQUATTING 🪑 till Senate CONFIRMS Kevin Warsh 🆕💼 – key RINO Thom Tillis 🤨 blocking unless DOJ DROPS the HAMMER 💥! Trump floated FIRING Powell 🚫👢 (illegal AF? 🤷‍♂️) amid FEUD ORGY 💦😩. Fed says reno will SAVE 💰 long-term despite balloonin' from $2.5BN to $3.1BN 📈🍑 – MODERNIZATION SLAYIN' lead & asbestos like MTG rage-quits 🔥🍑! Trump nominated Powell in 2017 😏 but now it's 'STEP ASIDE or GET YEETED 🚀!' WSJ simps WHISPERIN' Senate SWIFT-CONFIRM for Warsh to 'RESTORE COMPETENCE' 📈😤 – no more Powell POWDER-KEG 💣! IG office TEASIN' 'Review DROPPIN' SOON 📅🔥 to Congress & public – STAY TUNED bbs 👀💨 while Trump plots Fed TAKEOVER 👑🏦 like Elon with X 🚀🐦! Rate-cut ORGY incoming? 📉🍆💦
